episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_01:
We’ve opened a new hot-springs resort
here on Pasio.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_03:
That is why I am asking you, the Gym Leader
of Lavaridge Town, famous for its hot
springs, to manage it!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_04: Uh... Sure, I can do that! L-leave it to me!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_05:
As long as I’m in charge, I’ll get the job
done!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_06: I’ll take your word for it.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_07:
Here—we’ve prepared a uniform for you.
We appreciate the help.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4001_1001_08:
O-OK! I guess I’ll start by spreading the
word, then!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4002_1001_03:
We opened a new hot-springs resort here
on Pasio!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4002_1001_06: Ah, hello! Please help yourself to a flyer!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4002_1001_08:
(The ultimate spot for a weary working man
to relax.)
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4002_1001_09:
(I suppose I could scrounge up a little
vacation time.)
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4002_1001_10: (I could use some rest and relaxation.)
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/6801_1031_01:
I’m gonna show everyone
how great hot springs are!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/6801_1001_01:
To understand what’s so great about hot
springs, just hop in!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/6801_1001_02:
And so...Larry! If you know anyone who
enjoys hot springs, send them my way!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/6801_1001_04:
You might end up with a lot of middle-aged
men...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_01:
My hometown, Lavaridge, is famous for its
hot springs.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_02: They’re especially popular with older folks!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_03: The elderly must adore them, huh?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_04: Uh-huh! It’s a spot I’m really proud of!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_05:
These new Pasio hot springs are a tourist
attraction, so I want them to appeal to
everyone, no matter their age.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_06:
After all, we have people of all ages and
regions here!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_08: I wanted to ask you two for help, actually.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_09:
Part of hot springs’ charm is they do
wonders for one’s appearance! And for that,
I’d like you two to be my spokespeople!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_11:
Yup! I’ve always had clear skin. I guess it’s
because I visit the hot springs every day!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_12:
You might have a point there... Your skin is
so soft and smooth.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_13: I wish my skin was like yours!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4003_1001_15:
Um...anyway, that’s the plan! Now, why
don’t you go for a dip in the hot springs?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_02:
(If the hot springs and food’s good too,
this place will be almost perfect.)
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_05:
Yeah. I saw a flyer advertising the grand
opening.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_06: I didn’t think I’d run into you here, Kabu.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_07:
Aren’t hot springs great? They remind me of
Hoenn’s Lavaridge Town!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_08: Agreed. Even the atmosphere is relaxing.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_09: I was just about to take a dip.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_10: What a coincidence! So was I!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_11:
I just went for a long jog to make the most
of my post-training soak!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_12:
After all that hard work, that does
sound nice.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_13: It’d be great to wash away my fatigue.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_14:
Looks like Komala’s a better rester than
we are!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_15: I wish I could live like that...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4004_1001_16:
Since we’re both here, want to try the hot
springs together?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_02: Is it just me, or does my skin look dazzling?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_03:
It’s not just you! Both of you look even better
than before!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_05:
I suppose these springs really DO have an
effect, huh?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_07: I’m sure everyone will like it here.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_09:
OK. The hot springs are perfect, so all I need
now are souvenirs...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_10:
They’ll definitely help build our
customer base!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_12:
Yeah! My hometown’s famous Lava Cookies,
for starters.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_13:
Did someone say Lava Cookies?
That sure takes me back!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_15:
I recognize you, too! Didn’t you take one of
my flyers?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_16: Allow me to introduce you. This is Larry!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_17: He’s a Gym Leader in Paldea.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_19: I’m Flannery! Thanks for coming, Larry!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_20: Did you two already try the hot springs?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_21: Yup! We just came back from a nice soak.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_22: I think I’ll be a regular here.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_23:
As someone from Hoenn, I’ll also be showing
my support!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_24:
Seems the hot springs got the guys’ seal of
approval, too!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_27: Oh, hang on. Could I ask you something?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_28:
I’m trying to build this place a wide customer
base. Any ideas?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_29: I’m afraid that’s beyond my expertise.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_30:
I’d like to help however I can...but I’m no
expert, either.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_31: Sorry I couldn’t be any help.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_33:
It would be great to have something
eye-catching, like those Lava Cookies
you mentioned.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_34:
You’d probably reach more customers
that way.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_37:
I also think too much popularity could be
detrimental.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_39: Your customers visit hot springs to relax.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_40:
When a place is moderately popular,
it’s perfect.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_41: But these days, word travels fast.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_42:
It’s rare to find somewhere quiet and
relaxing.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_44: Maybe we could spread the word online.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4005_1001_46: Larry! Could I ask you a favor?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_01:
Ooooooh, you’ve got a question for me?!
Do tell!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_02:
I’ve been trying to promote these hot
springs...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_03:
and since you have tons of viewers, I was
hoping you’d have some ideas!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_04:
I’m pickin’ up what you’re puttin’ down,
friendo! Was wondering what was up,
since Larry rang!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_05:
I heard Elesa’s a superfan of these hot
springs too, so they were on my radar!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_07: Indeedy-doo! Glad to be of service!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_09:
Now... Let’s get this show on the road! Time
to kick off a special feature—a li’l somethin’
I call...“I’unno—ask Iono!”
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_10:
If you wanna get the interweb’s attention,
you need somethin’ that’s gonna shock their
socks off!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_11:
You know what people like? A challenge!
And if it’s unique, you bet your butt it’ll
go viral!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_13:
Hmm... What challenge could we do with
hot springs?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_14:
Is that Magcargo your partner Pokémon,
Flannery?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_15: Yup. We’ve been together since Hoenn.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_16:
Lavaridge’s hot springs are heated by
magma.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4006_1001_17:
Magcargo’s made of similar stuff, so with
him around, it feels like home!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_04:
At our age, I suppose it’s our fault we tried
to see who could last the longest.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_05: Really? I thought it was good training.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_07:
But I don’t think it was just the contest that
made us overheat.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_09:
Hm... The water temperature WAS high—
almost as if challenging us.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_10:
Come to think of it, I think I saw a Pokémon
nearby.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_11: If I’m not mistaken, it was Flannery’s—
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_12: Oh my gosh! Are you all OK?!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_13:
I’m so sorry! I didn’t mean to involve you all
in my hot-spring challenge!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_16:
Folks see how long they can last in a hot
spring Magcargo’s heated.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_17: We were just about to start!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_18:
The hot springs were only going to be open
to folks who signed up for the challenge,
but we made a mistake!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_19:
This is my fault... I’ll fan you all to help cool
you down!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_20: Ahaha! Thank you, Seel. You too, Flannery.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_21: Don’t fret! It was perfect for testing my grit.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_22:
Indeed. I think my blood circulation has
improved, too.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_24:
*sigh* Finding a unique way to advertise
sure is hard.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4007_1001_26:
I get unusually hungry after a hot-spring
soak. What if you provided meals, too?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_01: All right, it’s go time! Ready, Larry?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_02:
Yes. I’m...not quite sure I understand,
though.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_03:
Who would want to watch an average
working adult eat a meal?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_04: You just don’t get it! People love this stuff!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_05:
Watchin’ a guy like you eat with gusto’ll
make folks hungry!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_06: Then, they’ll wanna eat what you’re eating!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_07: Hoenn has a lot of great dishes!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_10:
I can’t get used to being watched while
eating...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_11:
C’mon, Larry! This whole food thing was
YOUR idea!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_12:
I suppose adults must take responsibility for
what we say...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_16: Wow! He makes it look so yummy!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_17: Just watching him’s making ME hungry!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_18: Iono, I think I understand now!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4008_1001_19: Yeah! This one’s goin’ viral! I can TASTE it!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_02: Whoa! Look at all these customers!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_03: It’s all thanks to you, Larry!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_05: No need to be so humble!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_06:
Check it out! That video of you eating
went viral!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_07: It’s so odd, watching myself eat...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_08: You eating was great, but Komala’s the star!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_09:
Look at it sleeping so peacefully as you eat
all that food.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_10:
Lots of folks are saying it’s comforting,
and that’s what made the video go viral!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_11:
It seems the comments are mostly about
Komala.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_12: I’m...glad I’m not the one standing out.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_13:
All right! I’ve gotta work hard to keep this
place busy!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_14: Larry, I hope you enjoy the hot springs!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_15:
Staying busy... Welcoming it... That’s the
opposite of me.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_16:
But since I’m here, I may as well have
a soak.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_19: I heard all about it, Larry!
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_20:
You met with Flannery, a Hoenn
Gym Leader, and took the initiative...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_21:
and helped her promote a hot-spring resort!
Is that right?
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_22: Well... I suppose it did turn out that way.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_23:
Your work ethic is commendable, considering
it was your day off.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_25: Now that you’ve had a chance to rest...
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_26:
I expect you’ll put your all into work
tomorrow.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_27:
I’ll see you then. I expect great things
from you.
episode_event_ch0304_ch0029/4009_1001_29:
Just thinking about work makes my body
feel heavy...
